title: Tagging Automation Recipes as Favorites

posts.author: Bill.D (Bill Dezell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I would like to suggest a feature that I don’t think exists. If it does, Please show me where to find it.

There are a lot of automation recipes, but only a few that we actually use. Is there/could there be a way to tag certain recipes as “favorites” to makin finding them easier?

Thanks.
